name: tencentcloud-sdk-python-yunsou

metadata.name: tencentcloud-sdk-python-yunsou
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: Apache Software License
metadata.summary: Tencent Cloud Yunsou SDK for Python

documentation:
# Tencent Cloud SDK for Python

Tencent Cloud Python Yunsou SDK is the official software development kit, which allows Python developers to write software that makes use of Tencent Cloud services like CVM and CBS.
The SDK works on Python versions:

> - 2.7 and greater, including 3.x

## Quick Start

First, install the library:

```sh
$ pip install tencentcloud-sdk-python-common
$ pip install tencentcloud-sdk-python-yunsou
```

or download source code from github and install:

```sh
$ git clone https://github.com/tencentcloud/tencentcloud-sdk-python.git
$ cd tencentcloud-sdk-python
$ python package.py --components common yunsou
```

请求编码，0表示utf8，1表示gbk，建议指定

documentation:
排序类型
\:rtype: int

\:rtype: int

documentation:

documentation:

\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.yunsou.v20180504.models.DataSearchRequest.QcBid
documentation:

\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.yunsou.v20180504.models.DataSearchRequest.GroupBy
documentation:
按指定字段进行group by，只能对数值字段进行操作
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.yunsou.v20191115.models.DataSearchRequest.ResourceId
documentation:

\:rtype: int

documentation:
检索串
\:rtype: str

documentation:
每页结果数
\:rtype: int

当前检索号，用于定位问题，建议指定并且全局唯一
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.yunsou.v20191115.models.DataSearchRequest.QueryEncode
documentation:
请求编码，0表示utf8，1表示gbk，建议指定
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.yunsou.v20191115.models.DataSearchRequest.RankType
documentation:
排序类型
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.yunsou.v20191115.models.DataSearchRequest.NumFilter
documentation:
数值过滤，结果中按属性过滤
\:rtype: str

documentation:
分类过滤，导航类检索请求
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.yunsou.v20191115.models.DataSearchRequest.Extra
documentation:
检索用户相关字段
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.yunsou.v20191115.models.DataSearchRequest.SourceId
documentation:
检索来源
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.yunsou.v20191115.models.DataSearchRequest.SecondSearch
documentation:
是否进行二次检索，0关闭，1打开
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.yunsou.v20191115.models.DataSearchRequest.MaxDocReturn
documentation:
指定返回最大篇数，无特殊原因不建议指定
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.yunsou.v20191115.models.DataSearchRequest.IsSmartbox
documentation:

methods.name: tencentcloud.yunsou.v20191115.models.DataSearchRequest.EnableAbsHighlight

\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.yunsou.v20191115.models.DataSearchRequest.QcBid
documentation:

\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.yunsou.v20191115.models.DataSearchRequest.GroupBy
documentation:
按指定字段进行group by，只能对数值字段进行操作
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.yunsou.v20191115.models.DataSearchRequest.Distinct
documentation:

\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.yunsou.v20191115.models.DataSearchResponse.RequestId
documentation:
唯一请求 ID，由服务端生成，每次请求都会返回（若请求因其他原因未能抵达服务端，则该次请求不会获得 RequestId）。定位问题时需要提供该次请求的 RequestId。
\:rtype: str
DataSearch返回参数结构体

> ```
> param _CostTime

> int
